title: Grastidium njongense
taxonomy: Grastidium njongense is a species of flowering plant in the family Restionaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. The classification of Grastidium njongense places it within the kingdom Plantae, and more specifically within the class Liliopsida. Furthermore, Grastidium njongense is a member of the family Restionaceae, which is a group of plants commonly known as restio's or reeds. Grastidium njongense is also known to be closely related to other plant species within the same family.
